prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安交通大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，C9联盟成员；软科中国大 学排名2026年位列第10名（Top10），近年排名稳定在第10名左右，属于国内顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要 涉及师德师风相关舆情事件，可能对报考热度产生轻微抑制作用；抖音综合热度排名第24位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，关注度尚可；历史投档异常记录中未见明显断档信 号；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科达13个，包括动力工程及工程热物理A+、电气工程A+、机械工程A+、控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A等，工科实力 突出，与海南省招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、自动化、计算机科学技术类等招生专业对应学科均为A级，社会专业热度持续高热推荐；海南 省2026年普通高考考生总数约78000人，较2025年67408人增长约15.7%，考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧；西安交通大 学位于陕西省（非本省），在海南省招生占比极小（2024年仅6人，占比约0.79%），跨省报考受地域偏好影响有限；该校在海南无本地招生倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次 持续前移趋势、2026年计划缩招22.2%的强竞争信号、海南省考生总数大幅增长15.7%以及学校声誉偏负面的轻微抑制作用，在2025年基准199名基础上，预计2026年最低录取位次 进一步前移至约180名，区间为159–201名。缩招是推动位次前移的最关键因素，考生规模扩大和声誉偏负面则起到部分缓冲作用。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Xi'an Jiaotong University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 380 → 392 → 294 → 235 → 199, showing a continuous upward trend, with a cumulative advancement of about 181 positions over the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline ranking is approximately 199, at a historical high; the enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Hainan Province was 11 students in 2021–2022, reduced to 7 in 2023, and rebounded to 9 in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan is 7 students, a reduction of about 22.2% compared to 9 in 2025, a significant contraction that will intensify competition and push rankings further upward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, a member of the C9 League; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 10th (Top 10), with stable rankings around 10th in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities, strongly attractive to high-scoring candidates; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving incidents related to teacher ethics and style, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm; its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 24th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure and moderate attention; no significant gaps in historical admission anomalies; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 13 disciplines rated A- or above, including Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A+, Electrical Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, etc., with outstanding engineering strength, highly matching the enrollment majors in Hainan Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Enrollment majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Automation, and Computer Science and Technology are all rated A-level, with sustained high social popularity and recommendations; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Hainan Province general college entrance examination is approximately 78,000, an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition; Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi Province (not local), with a very small enrollment share in Hainan (only 6 students in 2024, accounting for about 0.79%), and cross-province applications are limited by regional preferences; the university has no local enrollment bias in Hainan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the strong competition signal of a 22.2% enrollment reduction in 2026, the significant 15.7% increase in the total number of candidates in Hainan Province, and the slight suppression effect of the university's negative reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 199, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to further advance to approximately 180, with a range of 159–201. The enrollment reduction is the most critical factor driving the ranking upward, while the expansion of the candidate pool and the negative reputation partially buffer the effect.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Automation
- Engineering Pilot Class (Electrical Category) (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Energy Internet Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Yuejie Plan Machine Major Pre-selection) (Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Energy and Power Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Computer Science and Technology Category) (Computer Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Internet of Things Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 180 (range 159–201), at a historical high. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the prediction range (within 159) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Automation and Electrical majors; those with rankings in the middle range (approximately 160–180) are advised to target Tier 2 Yuejie Plan Machine and Computer categories as the main direction; those with rankings near the upper end of the range (approximately 180–201) can consider Tier 3 Clinical Medicine as a safe choice. All tier majors have strong disciplinary strength, and it is recommended to make a comprehensive decision based on personal interests and career plans.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年扩招50%的供给增加效应与临床医学持续高热度的需求支撑，预计2026年医学类最低录取位次约为400名，较2025年有所下降（位次数字增大），波动区间预计在368至 432名之间。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University only offers the Clinical Medicine major in Hainan Province. In 2023, the minimum admission rank was 328 (planned 2 students), dropping to 432 in 2024 (planned 2 students), and rising back to 298 in 2025 (planned 2 students). In 2026, the medical enrollment plan expands from 2 to 3 students, an increase of 50%, which will significantly lower the rank (increase the rank number).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a directly affiliated 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university under the Ministry of Education, with strong comprehensive strength. Its Medical School (formerly Xi'an Medical University) has a long history, and the Clinical Medicine major is particularly outstanding, enjoying a high reputation nationwide, which continuously attracts Hainan candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) is the only medical major offered in this province. It features an eight-year combined bachelor's and master's program, promising good employment prospects and extremely high application popularity. Hainan Province has a small medical enrollment scale, with Xi'an Jiaotong University offering only one medical major, leading to high competition concentration, and rank fluctuations are significantly affected by plan changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the supply increase of 50% in 2026 and the sustained high demand for Clinical Medicine, it is predicted that the minimum admission rank for Medicine in 2026 will be approximately 400, lower than in 2025 (rank number increases), with a fluctuation range expected between 368 and 432.
